content: Octowiki is installed and initialized in the intentional repo at wiki/pages/. It is the destination for distilled intent from the triage pipeline.

provenance.raw_agent: Done. Wiki is scaffolded at wiki/pages/. The CLAUDE.md has been updated with wiki instructions for agents.
